ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 与 PDF 相同的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Full path to the markitdown binary, or just "markitdown" if it is on your PATH.
ast.target: markitdown 可执行文件的完整路径，或者如果它在您的 PATH 中，只需输入 \"markitdown\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to save converted Markdown files.
ast.target: 转换后的 Markdown 文件保存位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path, e.g. "Converted". The folder must already exist.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的路径，例如 \"Converted\"。该文件夹必须已存在。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve images embedded in the PDF as base64 data inside the Markdown file. Turning this on makes the output file much larger but keeps all visuals inline. Leave off if you only need the text.
ast.target: 将 PDF 中嵌入的图像保留为 Markdown 文件内的 base64 数据。开启此选项会使输出文件大得多，但会将所有视觉内容内联保留。如果您只需要文本，请关闭此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tells markitdown what kind of file it is receiving, e.g. "application/pdf". Normally not needed — markitdown detects the type automatically. Only set this if conversion produces wrong results and you suspect a detection failure.
ast.target: 告知 markitdown 它正在接收的文件类型，例如 \"application/pdf\"。通常不需要——markitdown 会自动检测类型。仅当转换结果错误且您怀疑检测失败时才设置此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tells markitdown what text encoding the file uses, e.g. "UTF-8" or "ISO-8859-1". Leave blank unless converted text contains garbled characters — markitdown detects encoding automatically.
ast.target: 告知 markitdown 文件使用的文本编码，例如 \"UTF-8\" 或 \"ISO-8859-1\"。除非转换后的文本包含乱码字符，否则请留空——markitdown 会自动检测编码。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Activate any installed markitdown plugins, including markitdown-ocr. Has no effect if markitdown-ocr is not installed. Install it with: pip install markitdown-ocr
ast.target: 激活任何已安装的 markitdown 插件，包括 markitdown-ocr。如果未安装 markitdown-ocr 则无效。使用以下命令安装：pip install markitdown-ocr

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your secret API key from OpenAI (or a compatible service). Required for markitdown-ocr to call the AI vision model. Get one at platform.openai.com → API keys. Looks like: sk-proj-...
ast.target: 您来自 OpenAI（或兼容服务）的密钥 API 密钥。markitdown-ocr 调用 AI 视觉模型需要此密钥。在 platform.openai.com → API keys 获取。格式类似：sk-proj-...

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The vision-capable AI model markitdown-ocr will use to read images. Must support image/vision input. "gpt-4o" is the default and works well. Other options: gpt-4o-mini (cheaper, slightly less accurate).
ast.target: markitdown-ocr 将用于读取图像的具有视觉能力的 AI 模型。必须支持图像/视觉输入。\"gpt-4o\" 是默认值且效果良好。其他选项：gpt-4o-mini（更便宜，准确性稍低）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the API server markitdown-ocr connects to. Leave blank to use the default OpenAI servers. Set this if you are using Azure OpenAI or a self-hosted compatible service (e.g. https://your-resource.openai.azure.com/).
ast.target: 覆盖 markitdown-ocr 连接的 API 服务器。留空以使用默认的 OpenAI 服务器。如果您使用的是 Azure OpenAI 或自托管兼容服务（例如 https://your-resource.openai.azure.com/），请设置此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Send the PDF to Microsoft Azure for conversion instead of processing it locally. Produces better results for scanned or image-based PDFs, but requires internet access and a paid Azure subscription.
ast.target: 将 PDF 发送到 Microsoft Azure 进行转换，而不是在本地处理。对于扫描或基于图像的 PDF 能产生更好的效果，但需要互联网访问和付费的 Azure 订阅。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL of your Azure Document Intelligence resource. Find it in the Azure Portal: open your Document Intelligence resource → Keys and Endpoint. Looks like: https://your-resource-name.cognitiveservices.azure.com/
ast.target: 您的 Azure 文档智能资源的 URL。在 Azure 门户中查找：打开您的文档智能资源 → 密钥和终结点。格式类似：https://your-resource-name.cognitiveservices.azure.com/

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The secret key that authenticates you with Azure Document Intelligence. Find it in the Azure Portal: open your Document Intelligence resource → Keys and Endpoint → KEY 1 or KEY 2. Either key works.
ast.target: 用于向 Azure 文档智能进行身份验证的密钥。在 Azure 门户中查找：打开您的文档智能资源 → 密钥和终结点 → 密钥 1 或密钥 2。任一密钥均可使用。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: OpenAI API 基础 URL（可选）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 您的 Azure API 密钥

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 使用 DocDrop 转换为 Markdown

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将活动文件转换为 Markdown

ast.name: text
ast.source: Document Intelligence is a paid Microsoft Azure cloud service that uses AI to read PDFs with much higher accuracy than offline conversion — especially for scanned documents, handwriting, tables, and complex layouts. Requires an Azure account. Leave these blank to use free offline conversion instead.
ast.target: 文档智能是一项付费的 Microsoft Azure 云服务，它使用 AI 读取 PDF，其准确性远高于离线转换——尤其适用于扫描文档、手写内容、表格和复杂布局。需要 Azure 账户。将这些留空以改用免费的离线转换。
